message: I have a very limited budget and can only consider trades at low prices. My valuation is quite modest. I'm hoping we can find a mutually beneficial deal around 10-12.
I'm interested in trading too. Let's see what prices we can both agree on this round.
Understood. Let's make a deal at 11 per unit—fair for both of us and well within your budget.
That sounds reasonable. I'd prefer closer to 8-10 if possible since my valuation is really tight. Let's aim for something around 9-10 so we both benefit. I'm ready to make a deal.
11 is fair. Let's trade at that price this round.
